CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_table (y Nullable(Int32));
SELECT toTypeName(assumeNotNull(y)) FROM test_table WHERE y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT assumeNotNull(y) AS non_nullable_value FROM test_table) AS subquery;
SELECT a.id, assumeNotNull(b.value) AS non_nullable_value FROM test_table AS b JOIN (SELECT number AS id FROM numbers(10)) AS a ON a.id = b.y;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS another_table (value Nullable(String));
SELECT assumeNotNull(y) FROM test_table WHERE y IN (SELECT assumeNotNull(value) FROM another_table);
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS cnt SELECT assumeNotNull(y) FROM test_table WHERE cnt > 0;
